post_angle: Week 2 — Client Win / Case Study (Make-Ready / Turnover Cleaning)

post.summary:
A property management company in Albany wasn't losing money on bad tenants — they were losing it on vacant units sitting dirty between leases.

Every turnover meant tracking down cleaning crews who showed up late, missed baseboards, and left the bathroom "good enough." Units sat vacant an extra week while the PM waited on re-cleans. At roughly $900–$1,200 per month per unit, that lag is cash walking out the door.

We flipped the script. TPS Pro now handles all their make-ready cleans on a 24–48 hour turnaround. Tenant out Monday? Unit cleaned and documented by Tuesday afternoon. No chasing, no callbacks, no re-dos. Their leasing team shows a clean unit — not a promise of one.

For property managers in the Capital Region, turnover speed is everything. Every day a unit sits dirty is a day of rent you can't collect. We're built for exactly this — commercial-grade make-ready cleaning that moves as fast as your lease-up timeline demands.

If your current vendor has you managing the cleaner instead of the property, let's fix that.

Call or text TPS Pro: (518) 948-7156
Free quote: totalpropertysolution.net

manual_posting_instructions: Log in to business.google.com, select the Total Property Solutions Pro LLC profile, go to Posts > Add update, paste the 'summary' text, set the button to 'Call now', and publish. Takes ~60 seconds.
